narrative:
Precinct E Liverpool 3-A (precinct in Columbiana County) has 605 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.5 percentage points.
